name: Hide Empty Folders
overview: Hides empty folders from Jellyfin library views
description: Automatically removes folders with no media files from the Jellyfin library database. Files on disk are NEVER deleted.

versions.changelog: CRITICAL FIX: Prevented CollectionFolder (library root) deletion. Movies/TV Shows libraries could be removed from Jellyfin when CollectionFolder was incorrectly included in folder types checked for emptiness. Added defensive double-check in deletion loop.
